title: astragalus gossypinus
intro: Astragalus gossypinus, also known as the cottonbean milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting compounds. The health benefits of Astragalus gossypinus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Astragalus gossypinus is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and can also be consumed as a dried root or extract.
